v1StateInV2.message: The '@State' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@Component'.
The '@Prop' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@Component'.
The '@Link' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@Component'.
The '@Provide' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@Component'.

v2LocalInV1.message: The '@Local' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@ComponentV2'.
The '@Param' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@ComponentV2'.
The '@Event' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@ComponentV2'.
The '@Local' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@ComponentV2'.
The '@Computed' decorator can only be used in a 'struct' decorated with '@ComponentV2'.

multiDecoratorMember.message: The property 'dualDec' cannot have multiple state management decorators.
The '@State' property 'stateLink' must be specified a default value.

decoratorOnStatic.message: The static variable of struct cannot be used together with built-in decorators.

watchValidation.message: Regular variable 'valueState' can not be decorated with '@Watch'.

customDialogRules.message: The '@CustomDialog' decorated custom component must contain a property of the CustomDialogController type.

structInheritance.message: Decorator '@Component', '@ComponentV2', or '@CustomDialog' is missing for struct 'StructExtends'.
Structs are not allowed to inherit from classes or implement interfaces.

duplicateBuildMethod.message: The struct 'NoBuildMethod' must have at least and at most one 'build' method.
solutions: A structurally modified page must have at least one and no more than one 'build' method.

buildWithParams.message: The 'build' method can not have arguments.

entryValidation.message: A page can't contain more than one '@Entry' decorator.
A page configured in 'main_pages.json or build-profile.json5' must have one and only one '@Entry' decorator.
solutions: Please make sure that the splash page has one and only one '@Entry' decorator.
